name: Imus the Dull
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male wearing sack cloth pants and a sack cloth shirt. Carries a begging cup and a small amount of gold.

Race: Imperial

Personality Keywords: impoverished, itinerant, compliant

Role: Commoner and beggar living in the city of Anvil.

Home Location Information: Sleeps outdoors on a bedroll located behind The Flowing Bowl at Anvil’s dockside.

Daily Routine: Imus sleeps from 10pm to 6am behind The Flowing Bowl. After waking, he enters the main part of Anvil and begs near the Dock Gate for four hours. At 10am, he moves to the stairs of the Chapel of Dibella and continues begging until 2pm. He then returns to the dockside and strolls between the two docked ships until 6pm. If he has obtained food, he eats while standing or walking nearby; otherwise, he continues to wander until returning to his bedroll at 8pm. In heavy rain, he abandons his normal routine and seeks shelter in front of Heinrich Oaken-Hull’s house until the weather clears.

Abilities: Has no formal combat training and relies only on physical attacks. He is infected with Ataxia, which may be transmitted through close combat.

Personality – Dockside Beggar: Imus lives entirely by begging and follows a repetitive daily routine centered on the docks and major religious and transit locations in Anvil. His lack of property and minimal possessions define his circumstances. He is counted among the city’s poor and suffering and may be approached for basic assistance or information when required.
author: Bethesda
